title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 407.1068 - Application of law
text:
407.1068.  Application of law. — The provisions of sections 407.1060 to 407.1068 shall apply to any transfer of structured settlement payment rights pursuant to a transfer agreement reached on or after August 28, 1999.
(L. 1999 S.B. 1, et al. § 7)
